file_insights: Created network_reachability.dart (470 lines): Comprehensive NetworkReachabilityService with actual HTTP testing capabilities
Created network_reachability_test.dart (156 lines): Full test suite with 13 test cases covering all scenarios
Updated offline_module.dart: Registered NetworkReachabilityService as singleton dependency
Updated build progress tracking: Marked subtask 3.3 as completed
Updated implementation plan with detailed notes and completion status
patterns_discovered: Singleton service pattern with dependency injection
HTTP HEAD request with GET fallback for lightweight testing
Smart caching with TTL and manual cache clearing
Comprehensive error handling for network timeouts and server errors
Test result data class with factory constructors for different states
Dio HTTP client with configurable timeout settings
Integration with AppConfig for endpoint configuration
gotchas_discovered: Method not allowed (405) handling requires fallback from HEAD to GET
Different timeout types (connection, send, receive) need specific handling
Cache TTL configuration must balance testing frequency with network efficiency
Error messages need to include specific timeout durations for debugging
Server unreachable vs. server error (5xx) distinction is important for UI feedback

approach_outcome.approach_used: Implemented comprehensive NetworkReachabilityService that performs actual HTTP requests to test API reachability with smart caching and robust error handling
approach_outcome.why_it_worked: Followed established project patterns from ConnectivityService, implemented proper HTTP testing with lightweight HEAD requests, created smart caching system, comprehensive timeout handling, and thorough test coverage with 13 test cases

recommendations: Consider adding network quality metrics (response time, success rate) for better offline-first user experience
Implement periodic background testing to maintain cache freshness even when no active listeners
Add exponential backoff for repeated failures to avoid hammering unreachable servers
Consider adding circuit breaker pattern for repeated network failures
Integrate with existing connectivity service for coordinated state management
Add logging for network tests to aid debugging production issues
Consider adding support for multiple test endpoints for comprehensive health checking
Implement result statistics tracking for monitoring network reliability over time
